failure.message:
1. Test Case ID: RJrrRS
- Server error
[500] Internal Server Error:
`{"error":"Failed to create scraping job: connection to server at \"dpg-d6or4g2a214c73f6hl20-a.virginia-postgres.render.com\" (35.174.144.149), port 5432 failed: SSL connection has been closed unexpectedly\n","timestamp":"2026-04-18T15:42:17.779831+00:00"}`
Reproduce with:
curl -X POST -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"chunking_config": null, "crawl_config": null, "metadata": {}, "url": "https://A.COM", "user_id": "0"}' https://vecinita-gateway-lx27.onrender.com/api/v1/modal-jobs/scraper

1. Test Case ID: RJrrRS
- Server error
[500] Internal Server Error:
`{"error":"Failed to create scraping job: connection to server at \"dpg-d6or4g2a214c73f6hl20-a.virginia-postgres.render.com\" (35.174.144.149), port 5432 failed: SSL connection has been closed unexpectedly\n","timestamp":"2026-04-18T15:42:17.779831+00:00"}`
Reproduce with:
curl -X POST -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"chunking_config": null, "crawl_config": null, "metadata": {}, "url": "https://A.COM", "user_id": "0"}' https://vecinita-gateway-lx27.onrender.com/api/v1/modal-jobs/scraper

1. Test Case ID: MPAIYx
- Server error
[500] Internal Server Error:
`{"error":"Failed to list jobs: connection to server at \"dpg-d6or4g2a214c73f6hl20-a.virginia-postgres.render.com\" (35.174.144.149), port 5432 failed: SSL connection has been closed unexpectedly\n","timestamp":"2026-04-18T15:44:26.709627+00:00"}`
Reproduce with:
curl -X GET 'https://vecinita-gateway-lx27.onrender.com/api/v1/modal-jobs/scraper?user_id=null&x-schemathesis-unknown-property=42'

1. Test Case ID: MPAIYx
- Server error
[500] Internal Server Error:
`{"error":"Failed to list jobs: connection to server at \"dpg-d6or4g2a214c73f6hl20-a.virginia-postgres.render.com\" (35.174.144.149), port 5432 failed: SSL connection has been closed unexpectedly\n","timestamp":"2026-04-18T15:44:26.709627+00:00"}`
Reproduce with:
curl -X GET 'https://vecinita-gateway-lx27.onrender.com/api/v1/modal-jobs/scraper?user_id=null&x-schemathesis-unknown-property=42'

1. Test Case ID: AJRIgG
- Server error
[500] Internal Server Error:
`{"error":"Failed to get job status: connection to server at \"dpg-d6or4g2a214c73f6hl20-a.virginia-postgres.render.com\" (54.87.193.254), port 5432 failed: SSL connection has been closed unexpectedly\n","timestamp":"2026-04-18T15:44:52.566498+00:00"}`
Reproduce with:
curl -X POST https://vecinita-gateway-lx27.onrender.com/api/v1/modal-jobs/scraper/0/cancel

- Server error
[500] Internal Server Error:
`{"error":"Failed to get job status: connection to server at \"dpg-d6or4g2a214c73f6hl20-a.virginia-postgres.render.com\" (54.87.193.254), port 5432 failed: SSL connection has been closed unexpectedly\n","timestamp":"2026-04-18T15:44:52.566498+00:00"}`
